{{Infobox madra
| name = Sword-aspect madra
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is made up entirely of [[sword]]-aspect [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] uses [[sword]]-[[madra]] to slice through glass walls.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] can manifest solid [[sword]]-[[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
